# Menu

A dropdown menu component for displaying a list of actions or options triggered by a button or other element.

## Import

```jsx
import { Menu } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

Menu components are accessed as properties of the main Menu component:

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Menu` | The root component that manages menu state. |
| `Menu.Trigger` | The element that opens the menu on click. |
| `Menu.Content` | The dropdown panel containing menu items. |
| `Menu.Item` | A single menu action item. |
| `Menu.ItemGroup` | A group of related menu items. |
| `Menu.ItemGroupLabel` | A label for a menu item group. |
| `Menu.Separator` | A visual separator between menu items. |
| `Menu.ItemCommand` | A keyboard shortcut indicator for a menu item. |
| `Menu.CheckboxItem` | A menu item with a checkbox toggle. |
| `Menu.RadioItemGroup` | A group of radio-style menu items (single selection). |
| `Menu.RadioItem` | A radio-style menu item within a radio group. |
| `Menu.ContextTrigger` | A trigger that opens the menu on right-click. |
| `Menu.TriggerItem` | A menu item that opens a sub-menu. |

## Props

### Menu

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `positioning` | `object` | - | Positioning options for the menu dropdown (e.g., `{ placement: "bottom-start" }`). |
| `closeOnSelect` | `boolean` | `true` | Whether the menu closes after selecting an item. |

## Usage

### Basic Menu

```jsx
<Menu>
  <Menu.Trigger asChild>
    <Button>Actions</Button>
  </Menu.Trigger>
  <Menu.Content>
    <Menu.Item value="edit">Edit</Menu.Item>
    <Menu.Item value="duplicate">Duplicate</Menu.Item>
    <Menu.Separator />
    <Menu.Item value="delete" color="red">Delete</Menu.Item>
  </Menu.Content>
</Menu>
```

### Menu with Groups

```jsx
<Menu>
  <Menu.Trigger asChild>
    <Button>Options</Button>
  </Menu.Trigger>
  <Menu.Content>
    <Menu.ItemGroup>
      <Menu.ItemGroupLabel>File</Menu.ItemGroupLabel>
      <Menu.Item value="new">New <Menu.ItemCommand>Ctrl+N</Menu.ItemCommand></Menu.Item>
      <Menu.Item value="open">Open <Menu.ItemCommand>Ctrl+O</Menu.ItemCommand></Menu.Item>
    </Menu.ItemGroup>
    <Menu.Separator />
    <Menu.ItemGroup>
      <Menu.ItemGroupLabel>Edit</Menu.ItemGroupLabel>
      <Menu.Item value="undo">Undo <Menu.ItemCommand>Ctrl+Z</Menu.ItemCommand></Menu.Item>
      <Menu.Item value="redo">Redo <Menu.ItemCommand>Ctrl+Y</Menu.ItemCommand></Menu.Item>
    </Menu.ItemGroup>
  </Menu.Content>
</Menu>
```

### Checkbox Menu Items

```jsx
<Menu>
  <Menu.Trigger asChild>
    <Button>View</Button>
  </Menu.Trigger>
  <Menu.Content>
    <Menu.CheckboxItem checked={showGrid} onCheckedChange={setShowGrid}>
      Show Grid
    </Menu.CheckboxItem>
    <Menu.CheckboxItem checked={showRulers} onCheckedChange={setShowRulers}>
      Show Rulers
    </Menu.CheckboxItem>
  </Menu.Content>
</Menu>
```

### Context Menu

```jsx
<Menu>
  <Menu.ContextTrigger asChild>
    <Box p="8" border="1px dashed" borderColor="gray.300">
      Right-click here
    </Box>
  </Menu.ContextTrigger>
  <Menu.Content>
    <Menu.Item value="cut">Cut</Menu.Item>
    <Menu.Item value="copy">Copy</Menu.Item>
    <Menu.Item value="paste">Paste</Menu.Item>
  </Menu.Content>
</Menu>
```
